title: DP-1 Extension Registry
description: Official registry of DP-1 protocol extensions

extensions.name: Channel Extension
extensions.description: Collaborative, persistent feeds of playlists with enhanced metadata and curation capabilities. Extends Playlist-Group with multi-curator support, publisher attribution, and verifiable identities.
features: Publisher attribution for institutions and collectives

extensions.name: Playlist Extension
extensions.description: Extensions to DP-1 playlists for dynamic item fetching, enhanced metadata, and optional experimental Note (intermission) fields on the playlist and on each item. Enables playlists to transition from static collections to live, personalized feeds.
features: Dynamic query for real-time item fetching from indexers
Curator metadata with DID-based verifiable identities
Fast start, rich upgrade rendering strategy
Experimental Note (intermission): optional short artist-authored text with optional display duration on the playlist and on each item; extension-only (allOf overlay), not canonical DP-1 core

changes: Playlist extension: optional experimental Note object on playlist and on each PlaylistItem (text required up to 500 characters; duration optional, default 20 seconds when omitted) for intermission-style screens between works.
Playlist extension: Note is validated only via the extension fragment and composed playlist schema (allOf); canonical core playlist.json unchanged.
Registry: Playlist Extension description and features list updated to document Note; status remains draft extension v0.1.0.
Playlist extension: document composed full-playlist validator at playlist_with_extension.json (allOf bundled core-compatible playlist + extension fragment).
Playlist extension: add bundles/playlist-core-v1.1.0.json so validation allows an empty items array when dynamicQuery is present, without changing the canonical core playlist schema.
Playlist extension: registry resources include composedPlaylistSchema pointing at the composed schema URL for implementers and SDKs.

process.proposal: Open GitHub issue with extension proposal
process.implementation: Reference implementation required for breaking changes
